title: 07 queue at the sky
prompt: References supply an ordinary suburban Peelerz world and appetizing fruit character scale only. A polite queue of ordinary neighbors and small fruit gummy people waits behind a real velvet rope on the sidewalk for its turn beneath the opening. A bored attendant checks one gummy peel as admission. Wide deadpan documentary composition. No circular portal, theme-park sign, religious gate, rainbow, crowd frenzy, floating staircase, or transformed houses.
